reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 예쁩니다. 봉투가 두껍고 약간 향기가 있어 배변처리하고도 냄새가 안나게 해주는 것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: It looks nice. The bags are thick and have a slight scent, so it seems to prevent odor even after picking up waste.

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
기존쓰던 풋백 바꿔주니 좋네요.
가볍고 리드줄에 가볍게 들고다닐수있어
대만족입니다.
reviews.content_en: It's great switching from my old poop bag dispenser. It's lightweight and easy to carry on the leash, so I'm very satisfied.

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
체험단 기회로 오마이푸백을 받았는데요!
너무 귀엽고 고리가 있어 리드줄에 걸어놓고 산책하기 너무 편합니다!
봉투도 초록색이라 안에 내용물도 보이지 않아서 더욱 좋네여
봉투 사이즈도 적당합니당! 
다 사용하게 되면 구매하러오겠습니다아~
reviews.content_en: I received OMY POOP BAG through a review event! It's so cute and has a loop, making it super convenient to hang on the leash during walks! The bags are also green so you can't see the contents inside, which is even better. The bag size is just right too! Once I use them all up, I'll definitely come back to buy more~

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content: 항상 봉투를 주머니에 가지고 다니다가 옷의 모든 주머니에서 똥봉투가 발견되길래 디스펜서가 필요할 것 같아 구매하게 되었어요! 노란색도 귀엽고 초록색도 귀여워서 2개나 사버렸네요 ㅋㅋ 고리가 약하다는 후기를 봤는데 예상보단 튼튼했고 잘 사용할 것 같아요 봉투에서 향기도 나고 이제 주머니에 봉투 안넣어다니고 깔끔하게 다닐생각하니까 좋아요 구매추천!
reviews.content_en: I usually carried bags in my pockets, but I kept finding poop bags in every pocket of my clothes, so I decided to get a dispenser! Both the yellow and green are cute, so I ended up buying two 😂 I saw reviews saying the loop was weak, but it's actually sturdier than expected and seems to work great. The bags have a nice scent too, and now that I can carry the dispenser instead of loose bags in my pockets, it feels so much cleaner. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 오늘 산책할 때 써봤는데 봉투크기도 좋고 잘 뜯어지고 너무 좋아요~ 늘 사람이 쓰는 투명비닐로 썼었는데 진작에 살걸 하는 마음이네요 ㅎㅎ 떨어지기 전에 리필도 구매해놔야겠어요 :)
reviews.content_en: I tried it on a walk today and the bag size is perfect, tears easily, and works great~ I used to always use regular clear plastic bags, so I'm kicking myself for not buying this sooner haha 😄 I should order refills before I run out :)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
백원딜로 구매했어요
봉지에서 은은한 향기가 나요
맨날 검정 봉지  들고 다니다 이거 가방에 달고 나가니 간지가 납니다 ㅎㅎ
카라비너가 조금 딱딱해서 끼울때 좀 불편한거 말고는 디자인도 품질도 대만족이에요
reviews.content_en: I got it on sale. The bags have a subtle scent. I used to always carry black bags around, but now that I have this attached to my bag, it looks pretty stylish haha! Other than the carabiner being a bit stiff when clipping, I'm very satisfied with both the design and quality.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 기존에 집에 있는건 쇠고리 타입이고 검정색이라 이쁘지도 않았는데요. 이건 가볍고 색깔도 완전 이삐요~ 이삐❤️
reviews.content_en: The one I had at home was a metal ring type and black, so it wasn't very pretty. But this one is lightweight and the color is so adorable~ So cute ❤️

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
푸백 사면서 가격 괜찮길래 하나 더 구매했어요ㅋㅋ
풉파우치 보다 플라스틱 종류가 조금 더 편한거같아요
사이즈도 좋고 색상도 진하고 ㅇㅖ쁜 초록이라 마음에 듭니다 후후후
reviews.content_en: I bought an extra one since the poop bag price was reasonable lol The plastic material feels a bit more convenient than the poop pouch. The size is great and the color is deep and pretty green, so I love it hehe

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 응가봉투루 딱이네여 색상두이쁘구
reviews.content_en: Perfect for poop bags! The color is pretty too.

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 색감도 예쁘고 뚜껑도 잘열려서 또 구매했어요 !! 다견가정이라 똥츄가 마니 필요한데 바잇미가 딱 이에용
reviews.content_en: The color is beautiful and the lid opens well, so I bought it again!! Since we have multiple dogs, we need lots of poop bags and BITE ME is perfect for us.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 끈은 제가 집에 있던거 걸어놓은거고 초록색 본통이랑 초록색걸이가 와요. 어디든 걸 수 있어서 편리하고 가볍고 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: The string is one I had at home, but it comes with a green main case and green hook. It's convenient since you can hang it anywhere, lightweight, and great! 😊

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
봉투가 튼튼하고 오픈하는곳이 표시되어있고
잘열려서 넘나 좋아요!! 가격도 굿굿!!
reviews.content_en: The bag is sturdy and the opening is clearly marked, and it opens so easily!! Love it!! The price is great too!!

reviews.name: H****
reviews.content: 스타일 있고 너무 편리합니다^^
reviews.content_en: Stylish and super convenient ^^

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
귀여워요:) 바잇미 비숑푸백 사용했는데 리드줄 바닥에
놔두면 비숑푸백도 더러워져서 플라스틱도 사봄
라벤더향 은은하게 나서 응가냄새 사라져줌 :)
reviews.content_en: It's cute :) I used BITE ME Bichon poo bags before, but when I left the leash on the ground the poo bag would get dirty too, so I tried the plastic one. It has a subtle lavender scent that makes the poop smell disappear :)

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 배변봉투케이스 할인해서 저렴하게 잘샀고 색도이쁘고 단단해서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Got the poop bag holder case on sale for a good price, the color is pretty and it's sturdy so I love it

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 사이즈도 아담하고 무겁지 않아서 리드줄에 걸어도 편하네요! 봉투도 튼튼한거같고 나중에 리필만 하면 돼서 편리한거같아요!
reviews.content_en: The size is just right and it's not heavy so it's comfortable to attach to the leash! The bags seem sturdy too, and it's convenient since I just need to refill later!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
디자인이 심플하고 사용하기 편한 거 찾다가 구매했어요
가격도 합리적이고 귀엽고 실용적이라 좋네요 :)
reviews.content_en: I was looking for something with a simple design that's easy to use, so I bought it. The price is reasonable, it's cute and practical so I'm happy :)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 가격대비 고퀄이네요 아주 만족합니다유 🤍🤍 모두 바이랩하세요
reviews.content_en: Great quality for the price. Very satisfied 🤍🤍 Everyone should buy this!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 선물할려고 구매!! 엄청 튼튼하고 디자인이 귀여워여!
reviews.content_en: Bought it as a gift!! It's super sturdy and the design is adorable!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
앙증맞고 디자인도 귀욥네요!
봉투랑 함께 잘 사용하고 있어요
가성비도 있고 만족합니다

하남시보호소 아가들이 가족을 기다려요 ㅠ
사지말고 입양해 주세요ㅠ
reviews.content_en:
It's adorable and the design is cute! I'm using it well together with the bags. It has good value for money and I'm satisfied.

The puppies at Hanam City Shelter are waiting for their families 😢 Please adopt instead of buying 😢

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 가볍고, 한장씩 톡! 뜯어서 쓸 수 있으니 간편해요! 이제 바리바리 봉투 챙길 필요도 냄새 풀풀 풍길 필요도 없어요! 산책 질 향상👍🏻
reviews.content_en: Light and convenient - I can tear off one sheet at a time! No need to carry around bulky bags or worry about odors anymore! Really improved our walks 👍🏻

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
봉투만 바잇미꺼 쓰다가 불편해서 디스펜서도 같이 구매해봤어요 봉투 교체할 때 너무 간편해서 좋아여ㅠ
떨어트려도 튼튼해서 더 만족
reviews.content_en: I used to just buy BITE ME bags, but found it inconvenient so I got the dispenser too. It's so convenient to replace the bags ㅠ And I'm even more satisfied because they're durable even when dropped

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
할인행사해서 배변봉투전에 상자로 사놓은거 있어서 세트로 쓰려구 샀어요
귀엽네요 초록색이!!^^
reviews.content_en: I had bought a box during a discount sale before this poop bag came out, so I got this as a set. It's cute - the green color!! ^^

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 리드쥴에 달고 다니면 댕편합니다 ! 그리고 생각보다 튼튼해서 내구성이 좋은 거 같아요
reviews.content_en: Super convenient to carry on Ggang's leash! And it's tougher than I expected, so the durability seems really good

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
배변봉투 디스펜서 너무편하고 이쁩니다
산책갈때가방에달고다니니 사용하기편하고 맘에듭니다
reviews.content_en: The poop bag dispenser is so convenient and pretty. I carry it in my bag when I go for walks, so it's easy to use and I love it

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content:
산책을 시작하는 강이지에게 선물했어요. 
풉백도 튼튼하고 케이스도 예쁩니다 :)
reviews.content_en: I got this as a gift for Gang-i who just started going on walks. The poop bags are durable and the case is pretty too :)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
무난하고 깔끔해서 좋아용 !
오히려 이런게 들고다니기도 더 편하고용
reviews.content_en: It's nice - simple and clean! Actually, it's even more convenient to carry around like this

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 저렴한 가격에 샀어욥 색상 이쁘고 환경보호도 되서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Got it at a cheap price! The color is pretty and I like that it's eco-friendly too

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
첫구매딜로싸게샀어용
산책할때 많이 유용할것같아요
reviews.content_en: Bought it on first purchase deal! It'll be really useful when I go for walks

reviews.name: m****
reviews.content: 봉투가 튼튼해서 좋아요.케이스도 심플하고
reviews.content_en: The bags are durable which is great. The case is also simple and nice

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 디자인이나 컬러가 너무 귀여워요.
reviews.content_en: The design and color are so cute! 🐾

reviews.name: j****
reviews.content:
이벤트가격에 득템이요
튼튼해보여요
reviews.content_en: Got it at an event price! 💯 Looks really durable

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 매번 뜯어갖고다니기 귀찮앗는데 요래 가방에다니 넘편해요~~
reviews.content_en: I used to find it annoying to carry it around loose, but having it in a bag like this is so convenient~~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저렴히 잘 샀어요 편리할듯합니다
reviews.content_en: Got it at a good price 😊 Seems very practical

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 배변봉투랑 디스펜서 둘 다 튼튼해서 아주 맘에 들어요.
reviews.content_en: Both the waste bags and dispenser are really sturdy, so I'm very happy with it.

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
노란색보다 초록색봉투가 좋네여
통도 초록색 너무 이뻐요
reviews.content_en: I like the green bags better than the yellow ones 💚 The container in green is so pretty too

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
먼저 노랑색 디스펜서를 쓰다가 뚜껑안쪽 롤 지지대가 부러져 봉투꺼낼때 돌아가지않아 불편하더라구요..그래도 잘 쓰던거라 그린으로 재구매했어요
일단 노랑색봉투는 응가를 담으면 겉으로 응가색이 드러나 보기가...ㅋ
초록은 봉투색이 진하니 비치지않고 좋네요^^
reviews.content_en: I used the yellow dispenser first, but the roll holder inside broke and it wouldn't rotate when I tried to pull out bags, which was inconvenient.. But since I liked using it anyway, I repurchased in green 😊 By the way, with the yellow bags, when you put poop in them, the color shows through from the outside which is... 😅 The green bags are darker so nothing shows through, which is nice^^

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 저렴하게 잘 샀네요 넘 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Got it at a good price and I love it so much! 💕

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 세트를 너무 좋은 가격에 좋습니다
reviews.content_en: The set is great at such a good price 👍

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
노랑 디스펜서 썼는데 안에 있는 고정부분 같은 곳이 풉백 한롤도 다 쓰기도 전에 4번째 깨져서 초록으로 바꿔봤어요ㅎ
초록은 밖에 생활기스가 많이 가지만
고정부분이 깨지진 않았던 기억이 있어서ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I used the yellow dispenser, but the fixing part inside broke after just the 4th roll, way before finishing even one roll 😅 So I switched to green. The green one does have some scuff marks on the outside from daily use, but I remember the fixing part didn't break on it ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
산책시 들고 다니는 풉백은 있고
캠핑가서 텐트에 걸어 놓으려고 주문했어요
플라스틱이라 밤이슬 내려도 괜찮을거 같아서
맘에 들어요
reviews.content_en: I already have a poop bag I carry on walks, but I ordered this one to hang in the tent when we go camping. Since it's plastic, I'm not worried about night dew, so I really like it!

reviews.name: 노****
reviews.content:
다른 줄에도 걸으려고 또 구매했어요 ^^
먼저 구매했던것도 잘쓰고 있어요~
reviews.content_en: I liked the first one so much I bought another one for a different leash ^^ The one I got before is still working great~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
기존에 사용하던게 잘 안닫혀서 다른제품 하고 함께 구입했어요 
가격도 저렴하게 구입해서 더 좋네요~
reviews.content_en: My old one wasn't closing properly, so I got this one along with another product. And the price was great too~

reviews.name: 토****
reviews.content: 행사하길래 재구매했어요. 이가방 저가방, 차에도 하나씩 두려구요.
reviews.content_en: There was a sale so I repurchased it. I'm planning to keep one in this bag, one in that bag, and one in the car.

reviews.name: 노****
reviews.content:
전에 몇번 잃어버려서 그냥 배변봉투 한 롤 통째로 가지고 다녔는데 새로운 배변봉투 구매하면서 구매해봤어요.
거는 고리가 얇은 플라스틱이라 너무 약해보여서 원래 달려있던가에 걸었답니당
reviews.content_en: I kept losing the old one, so I used to just carry around a whole roll of poop bags. When I bought new bags, I tried this dispenser. But the hanging loop is thin plastic and looked too flimsy, so I ended up hanging it on the original attachment.

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content: 디스펜서없이 다니다가 이번에 구매해보니 더 편하고 좋네요 관리도 쉽습니다
reviews.content_en: I used to go around without a dispenser, but now that I got this one, it's so much more convenient and easy to manage!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
무난하게 사용하기 좋아요
리필시 오픈하기 어렵지 않아서 만족합니다
reviews.content_en: It's really practical to use with no hassles. I'm satisfied because it's not difficult to open when refilling.

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 날씨도 시원하니 산책을 자주하니 많이 필요했는데 색도 이쁘네요.
reviews.content_en: The weather's been nice so we've been taking walks more often and needed lots of bags. The color is cute too!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 경품 당첨돼서 받은건데 생각보다 배변봉투가 튼튼하고 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: I got this as a prize, but the poop bags are sturdier and better quality than I expected!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 실외배변할때 찰떡이에요. 꺼내쓰기도쉬워서 잘 사용중입니다~!
reviews.content_en: It's perfect for outdoor bathroom breaks. It's so easy to pull out and use, and I'm really happy with it~!
